steps.label: Choose
steps.title: Choose your algorithm
steps.description: Pick from 25 algorithms across 4 categories — sorting, searching, graphs, and more. Find exactly what you need without endless scrolling.

steps.label: Visualize
steps.title: Watch every state play out
steps.description: Step through each algorithm with interactive scrub controls. Move forward or backward through every state — no more static diagrams.

steps.label: Understand
steps.title: Pseudocode synced to the step
steps.description: The code panel highlights the current line as the visualization runs. See exactly what happens at each step.
